symbols: cupid above — erotic desire directing the encounter
landscape vista — the pastoral setting of classical myth
description: An engraving depicting a reclining nude woman asleep on draped fabric, her body turned toward the viewer. Behind her, a bearded muscular male figure with an animal-like lower body (a satyr form) leans over her, gazing at her face. Above them, a small winged cupid figure hovers, looking down. In the upper left background, a pastoral landscape with trees and distant hills is visible through an opening. The work is rendered in fine cross-hatched lines typical of reproductive engraving.
